column1: ── TOP 10 CONDITIONS WHERE AOD IS A GOOD PROXY ──
✘ AOD alone is NOT a reliable PM2.5 proxy overall.
Key meteorological factors to control for in Bangladesh:
• Monsoon vs. Winter season (aerosol load & type differ greatly)
• Rain status (wet scavenging decouples AOD from surface PM2.5)
• Humidity profile (hygroscopic growth inflates AOD artificially)
• Temperature (affects boundary layer height & aerosol concentration)
